suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow a small-fix validation path for narrowly scoped wiring changes (e.g., one-line event handler fixes) where mandatory manual browser validation and test additions are optional if existing suite/typecheck pass.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature `fix-rotate-share-button` was a targeted one-line navigation wiring correction with passing validators; reviewer observed the current ui-builder procedure is overly rigid for this class of change.

rejectedObservations.observation: ui-builder skill and direct agent-browser CLI usage mismatch.
